prevalence.trend: increasing with obesity and diabetes prevalence

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate; progression to NASH/cirrhosis in a subset

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Imaging evidence of steatosis (ultrasound) plus exclusion of significant alcohol use and other liver disease; fibrosis assessment as needed

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; lifestyle adherence limits control

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Ultrasound in primary care; elastography and hepatology referral in tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Weight loss, diet and exercise, control of diabetes and lipids; manage fibrosis risk
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to specialized fibrosis assessment and structured lifestyle programs
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Primary care NCD programs and growing hepatology networks
